DeepL

AI-powered translation tool renowned for natural and accurate translations

9/10Overall Rating
10/10Ease of Use
FreeStarting Price
2017Founded
Free Plan Available

About DeepL

DeepL is a ai translation platform founded in 2017. It positions itself as “AI-powered translation tool renowned for natural and accurate translations” and is best suited for businesses, translators, content teams. Pricing starts at Free, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Machine TranslationYes
Translation MemoryNo
GlossaryYes
Api AccessYes
File FormatsYes
Team CollaborationYes
Quality AssuranceNo
Cms IntegrationNo
Real TimeYes
Custom ModelsNo

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Best translation quality for European languages
  • Excellent document translation
  • Clean and simple interface

Cons

  • Fewer languages than Google Translate
  • Free plan has character limits
  • No TMS features

Compare DeepL With Others

DeepL vs Google TranslateDeepL vs SmartlingDeepL vs Phrase (Memsource)DeepL vs LokaliseDeepL vs WeglotDeepL vs TransifexCrowdin vs DeepLDeepL vs POEditorDeepL vs memoQDeepL vs SDL TradosDeepL vs UnbabelDeepL vs TranslatedDeepL vs ModernMTDeepL vs Lingvanex
